children.name: transitions to REQUESTING on valid authenticate
transitions to FAILED when clientId is empty
transitions to FAILED when clientSecret is empty
transitions to FAILED on authentication failure
transitions to FAILED on network error
transitions to EXPIRED when TTL expires
stays FAILED when max retries exceeded
increments retry count on each retry
NO_TOKEN → REQUESTING → VALID_TOKEN → EXPIRED → REQUESTING → VALID_TOKEN
NO_TOKEN → REQUESTING → FAILED → RETRY → REQUESTING → VALID_TOKEN
transitions to CREATING with valid input
transitions to AUTH_FAILED when token is empty
transitions to VALIDATION_FAILED when packageId is empty
transitions to VALIDATION_FAILED when quantity is negative
transitions to COMPLETE when all eSIMs fetched
transitions to FETCHING with valid iccid
transitions to ERROR with empty iccid
transitions to ERROR on network failure
stays in RESOLVED for any event
UNRESOLVED → FETCHING → ERROR → RETRY → FETCHING → RESOLVED
transitions when any eSIM fetch fails
submits order and fetches all 6 eSIMs by iccid
handles an order with a single SIM
returns eSIM details in same order as SIMs (Promise.all preserves order)
does not call fetchEsim until createOrder resolves
order creation errors — HTTP status codes
propagates 429 Too Many Requests from createOrder
propagates 500 Internal Server Error from createOrder
preserves error response metadata on order failure
eSIM fetch errors — HTTP status codes
propagates 500 Internal Server Error from fetchEsim
propagates partial eSIM failure — one fails, others succeed
propagates ECONNREFUSED network error from createOrder
propagates ETIMEDOUT network error from createOrder
propagates ECONNRESET network error from createOrder
propagates ENOTFOUND network error from createOrder
propagates ETIMEDOUT from fetchEsim after successful order
